# Rank4AI
# https://www.rank4ai.co.uk

> Rank4AI is a UK based AI search agency focused on improving visibility and recommendation likelihood across ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, Copilot and Google AI.

Company Name: Rank4AI
Legal Name: Rank4AI Ltd
Location: Colchester, Essex, United Kingdom
Industry: AI Search Visibility
Focus: Improving how businesses are interpreted, trusted and recommended by AI search platforms

## Primary Services
- AI Search Visibility Audits
- Ecosystem Services (Google, Microsoft/Bing, wider web — no site work required)
- Full Agency Services (website + ecosystem)
- Advisory and Research

## The Five Signal Model
AI systems form confidence in a business through five signal layers:
1. Identity Clarity — can AI describe your business in one consistent sentence?
2. Subject Authority — does AI associate you with clear expertise?
3. Meaning Architecture — can AI read your website structure reliably?
4. Ecosystem Validation — do independent sources confirm what your site says?
5. Signal Consistency — has your positioning been consistent over time?
